name: canary
description: Canary browser automation + recorded QA sessions: sandbox scripting skills and verify/automate/session/review workflows for Codex.

interface.shortDescription: Automate a browser and record verifiable QA sessions.
interface.longDescription: Canary gives Codex a sandbox scripting reference plus focused workflows to turn a code change into a QA plan, automate a browser one-off, record a capture-enabled QA session (trace/video/HAR/console) with a report, and review recorded sessions.
defaultPrompt: What should I QA for these changes?
Record a QA session for this flow.
